statements.sql: select `permissions`.*, `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` as `pivot_permission_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` from `permissions` inner join `model_has_permissions` on `permissions`.`id` = `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` where `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` in (7) and `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` = 'App\\Models\\Admin'

select `roles`.*, `model_has_roles`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_roles`.`role_id` as `pivot_role_id`, `model_has_roles`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` from `roles` inner join `model_has_roles` on `roles`.`id` = `model_has_roles`.`role_id` where `model_has_roles`.`model_id` in (7) and `model_has_roles`.`model_type` = 'App\\Models\\Admin'

select _ta.total as attendance_total, _ta.user_id,
u.name as user_name, u.email as email, u.gender as user_gender, u.contact as user_contact, u.network_type as user_network_type, c.course_name, c.location as course_location, c.id, cs.name as session_name  from
(select count(distinct `a`.`date`) AS `total`,max(`a`.`user_id`) AS `user_id`
from `attendances` `a`
where DATE(a.date) between '2025-05-21 00:00:00' AND '2025-05-21 00:00:00'
group by `a`.`user_id`) as _ta
left join users u on u.userId = _ta.user_id
left join user_admission ua on ua.user_id = _ta.user_id
left join course_sessions cs on cs.id = ua.session
inner join courses c on c.id = ua.course_id
order by c.course_name, u.name
